notes: Verified via WebSearch 2026-07-11: 8 Dhul-Hijjah, named for pilgrims historically stocking up on water (tarwiyah) before heading to water-scarce Mina/Arafat.
Verified via binbaz.org.sa fatwa: pilgrim enters ihram for hajj, moves to Mina, prays the 5 prayers there and stays overnight (confirmed sunnah).
Fasting recommended for non-pilgrims as part of the virtuous first 10 days of Dhul-Hijjah.
hijri type with year-pair fix applied to h1/ogTitle/schemaData.eventDescription per islamic_year_pair_missing rule.
countryScope: all (universal Islamic observance, no country-specific content needed).
